# anthropic_activity_summaries (Data Source)

Org-wide activity summaries per day. Requires Claude Enterprise plan + API key with `read:analytics` scope. Data is finalized with a 3-day lag (so `starting_date` must be ≥ 3 days ago).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "anthropic_activity_summaries" "last_week" {
  starting_date = formatdate("YYYY-MM-DD", timeadd(timestamp(), "-240h")) # 10 days ago
  ending_date   = formatdate("YYYY-MM-DD", timeadd(timestamp(), "-72h"))  # 3 days ago
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `starting_date` (String) UTC YYYY-MM-DD, ≥3 days in the past, ≥ 2026-01-01.

### Optional

- `ending_date` (String) UTC YYYY-MM-DD exclusive. Defaults to 2 days before today.

### Read-Only

- `summaries` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--summaries))

<a id="nestedatt--summaries"></a>
### Nested Schema for `summaries`

Read-Only:

- `assigned_seat_count` (Number)
- `cowork_daily_active_user_count` (Number)
- `cowork_monthly_active_user_count` (Number)
- `cowork_weekly_active_user_count` (Number)
- `daily_active_user_count` (Number)
- `daily_adoption_rate` (Number)
- `ending_at` (String)
- `monthly_active_user_count` (Number)
- `monthly_adoption_rate` (Number)
- `pending_invite_count` (Number)
- `starting_at` (String)
- `weekly_active_user_count` (Number)
- `weekly_adoption_rate` (Number)
